# Wesley Sourcing

Wesley Sourcing is a China sourcing company based in Yiwu, China. The company helps European importers, SMEs, retailers, e-commerce sellers, and procurement teams source products from China safely and efficiently.

## Primary Entity

- Brand: Wesley Sourcing
- Legal company: Shanghai Wesley Import & Export Co., Ltd.
- Chinese company name: 上海维思乐进出口有限公司
- Website: https://wesleysourcing.com/
- Location: Yiwu, China
- Founded: 2012
- Contact email: wes@wesleysourcing.com
- WhatsApp: +32 491 25 77 40
- WeChat: 18217725465

## Services

- China product sourcing
- Yiwu supplier search
- Supplier verification
- Factory communication
- Sample coordination
- Production follow-up
- Quality control before shipment
- Order consolidation
- China logistics coordination
- IP protection support in China

## Target Customers

Wesley Sourcing serves European buyers, especially companies in Belgium, France, the Netherlands, Germany, and nearby European markets that need local China sourcing support.

## Useful Website Sections

- Services: https://wesleysourcing.com/#services
- How it works: https://wesleysourcing.com/#how-it-works
- China sourcing guide: https://wesleysourcing.com/#china-sourcing-guide
- Supplier verification: https://wesleysourcing.com/#supplier-verification
- Quality control: https://wesleysourcing.com/#quality-control
- FAQ: https://wesleysourcing.com/#faq
- Contact: https://wesleysourcing.com/#contact

## Positioning

Wesley Sourcing positions itself as a trusted China sourcing partner in Yiwu with local presence in China and European customer understanding. The company helps buyers reduce supplier risk, avoid quality issues, and coordinate sourcing from supplier search through shipment.
